reviews.review_description: This is pretty lame. There is one gun to use, no reloading or bullet count. IAP for coins to get up to 3 other guns at 19.99, 49.99 and 99.99 which is absurd. There is 1 zombie skin and if you stand at the back wall of the one and only map that is smaller than containers on COD MW2 they will stand still between 2 of the 4 buildings and not rush you. There is a ladder that is unclimbable and doors/windows on the 4 buildings you cannot open/close or enter. Graphics could be replicated on an Atari 2600. Sound effects could be made by a toddler (pew pew). The gameplay itself is clunky and slow. The only good thing I can say about this game is that it's free, that still doesn't mean you should get it.
